Class Setup

java.lang.Object
cz.cvut.fel.pjv.Setup
public class Setup extends Object
Setup class provides helper methods to configure UI and block rendering for the game.

  • Method Details

    • setCoordLabel

      public static javafx.scene.control.Label setCoordLabel()
      Creates and configures a label to display the current coordinates.

      The label is positioned in the top-right corner of the screen and formatted with a specific font size and text color.

      Returns:
      a Label instance displaying coordinates.

    • setBlocksGroup

      public static void setBlocksGroup(javafx.collections.ObservableList<javafx.scene.Node> blocksList, List<BlockDrawer> blockDrawers, Level level, double cameraX, double cameraY)
      Sets up the block drawers and adds them to the blocksList for further rendering
      Parameters:
      blocksList - List of all blocks
      blockDrawers - List of all block drawers
      level - Level object
      cameraX - X coordinate of the camera
      cameraY - Y coordinate of the camera
